title: Iron Apples
description: A high quality mod that adds different tiers of apples. (Ex:- Iron Apple, Gold Apple).
body:
-STILL WORKING ON OTHER VERSIONS
 \-Iron Apples mod adds **different tiers of apples** that give more buffs and abilities as the tiers go up. \-You can craft the apples by **crafting the specific tier you need in a crafting table.** \-The **higher the tier the more buffs the apple gives** to your character. Netherite Apple is the highest tier of apple in versions above the nether update (1.16+). However, you can use this mod in 1.12.2 with FutureMC installed and it will add the **Netherite Apple in 1.12.2 even though it is an old version.** \-Report any bugs in the comment section. \-No known bugs as of now. \-[_Iron Apples Curseforge_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-apples-forge)
